<!-- Generated with https://github.com/reakaleek/gh-action-readme -->

# <!--name-->Determine npm Release Version<!--/name-->

<!--description-->
Resolve the npm package version, release tag, and release URLs for tag or workflow_dispatch releases.
<!--/description-->

## Inputs

<!--inputs-->
| Name                | Description                                                       | Required | Default        |
|---------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------|----------|----------------|
| `version`           | Optional explicit x.y.z version for workflow_dispatch.            | `false`  | ` `            |
| `release-type`      | npm version release type when version is empty.                   | `false`  | `patch`        |
| `event-name`        | GitHub event name. Defaults to GITHUB_EVENT_NAME.                 | `false`  | ` `            |
| `tag-name`          | Tag name for tag-triggered releases. Defaults to GITHUB_REF_NAME. | `false`  | ` `            |
| `tag-prefix`        | Tag prefix to add or strip.                                       | `false`  | `v`            |
| `package-json`      | Path to package.json relative to working-directory.               | `false`  | `package.json` |
| `working-directory` | Directory containing package.json.                                | `false`  | `.`            |
| `github-server-url` | GitHub server URL. Defaults to GITHUB_SERVER_URL.                 | `false`  | ` `            |
| `github-repository` | owner/repo repository name. Defaults to GITHUB_REPOSITORY.        | `false`  | ` `            |
<!--/inputs-->

## Outputs

<!--outputs-->
| Name                 | Description                     |
|----------------------|---------------------------------|
| `version`            | Resolved package version.       |
| `tag`                | Resolved release tag.           |
| `package_name`       | Package name from package.json. |
| `npm_release_url`    | npm package release URL.        |
| `github_release_url` | GitHub release URL.             |
<!--/outputs-->

## Usage

<!--usage action="Nick2bad4u/workflow-templates/.github/actions/determine-npm-release-version" version="main"-->

```yaml
steps:
 - name: "Determine release version"
   id: "version"
   uses: "Nick2bad4u/workflow-templates/.github/actions/determine-npm-release-version@main"
   with:
    event-name: "${{ github.event_name }}"
    release-type: "${{ inputs.release_type || 'patch' }}"
    tag-name: "${{ github.ref_name }}"
    version: "${{ inputs.version || '' }}"
```

<!--/usage-->
